BEST AIR 0.00S
TOP HEIGHT 0.0M
VertiBoard
CONTROLS
TOP BAR + RIGHT SIDE: Drag to LOOK / MOVE CAMERA.

LEFT LOWER LANE: Drag L/R to CARVE. Swipe up to PUSH. Flick left/right on the ground for a SIDE POP that launches you into the air. In the air, a single L or R flick still does the side pop / wall jump. Then a fast follow-up combo resolves as: LL = KICKFLIP and RR = HEELFLIP (board flips underneath), LR = FRONT POP SHOVE-IT, RL = BACK POP SHOVE-IT.

RIGHT LOWER PAD: Tap to JUMP / OLLIE. Tap again in air for DOUBLE JUMP.

Side pop near a wall to do a WALL JUMP / WALL KICK. Buildings use PEGS, roof ledges, and right-angle climb lines so they are always climbable.

EDIT BUILDING SIDE
Select a building, choose a face, then place pegs or rails exactly where you want them on that side.
